PropertyTypes.Caption: Repeat element
PropertyTypes.Description: Repeat element for each item in data source.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Attributes
PropertyTypes.Description: The HTML attributes that are added to the HTML element. For example: ‘title‘, ‘href‘. If ‘class’ or ‘style’ is added as attribute this is merged with the widget class/style property. For events (e.g. onClick) use the Events section.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Sanitization configuration
PropertyTypes.Description: Configuration for HTML sanitization in JSON format. Leave blank for default.

PropertyTypes.Caption: The area to open or close the menu.
PropertyTypes.Description: Responsible for toggling the Pop-up menu.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Style
PropertyTypes.Description: An extra class will be added: "popupmenu-basic-item-[style]"

PropertyTypes.Caption: Menu items
PropertyTypes.Description: The popup menu custom items. To make sure the popup closes correctly after a click, do not configure clickable widgets inside the placeholders. Use the action property of this widget.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Menu position
PropertyTypes.Description: The location of the menu relative to the click area.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Clipping strategy
PropertyTypes.Description: 'Absolute' positions the floating element relative to its nearest positioned ancestor, while 'Fixed' breaks it out of any clipping ancestor.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Show preview
PropertyTypes.Description: Use this to see a preview of the menu items while developing.

Type.WidgetDescription: Displays a set of pre-defined items within the Pop-up menu

PropertyTypes.Caption: Style
PropertyTypes.Description: Custom enables placeholders for using widgets for the different states.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Default image
PropertyTypes.Description: This is the image that is displayed if no image is uploaded.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Image URL
PropertyTypes.Description: The link of the external image.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Background image
PropertyTypes.Description: Whether the image is rendered as a background. More content can be put inside, while design properties will have no effect.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Alternative text
PropertyTypes.Description: Alternative text of the image for accessibility purposes.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Height unit
PropertyTypes.Description: Auto will keep the aspect ratio of the image.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Icon size
PropertyTypes.Description: The size of the icon in pixels.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Responsive
PropertyTypes.Description: Image will never get larger than its original size. It can become smaller.

Type.WidgetDescription: Display an image and enlarge it on click.
